meaning: vt.赋予人性,使通人情,教化vi.变为有人性,变为有情,有教化
examples: These measures are intended to humanize the prison system.
They encouraged the public festivals which humanize the manners of the people.
They would be a prior step, taken to humanize one another in our imaginations.
Being big, however tends to de-humanize them and can disconnect them from their mission.
